title: Hasun Hasun Yenar Kon
subTitle: A comprehensive collection of some of the most hilarious comedy skits, featuring talented artists that entertain the audience with their rib-tickling humour.

title: No. 1 Businessman
subTitle: An intelligent and ambitious youngster arrives in Mumbai and becomes a mafia don, but one day, things take turn when he falls in love with a cop's daughter.

title: Ventilator
subTitle: The Kamerkar family comes together in the hospital when their eldest and most beloved member is put on a ventilator. While waiting for him to stabilise, everyone tackles their issues and dysfunctions.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: The yoga guru, Baba Ramdev emphasises on the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Khwada
subTitle: Raghu Karhe and his family are forced to move from different places. An evil landlord makes their life difficult after Raghu's son, Balu, wins over his men in wrestling.

title: Fandry
subTitle: Jabya, who lives on the outskirts of his village, falls in love with Shalini and tries to impress her. However, he and his family face the heavy burden of caste oppression.
